title: AI VPN
description: A self-optimizing VPN that routes traffic through the lowest-latency hop using a lightweight ML model.
longDescription: AI VPN continuously benchmarks candidate exit nodes and predicts the fastest route for the current network conditions, instead of relying on static server lists. A small regression model retrains on-device every few hours using anonymized latency samples.
architecture: Client agent (Go) benchmarks nodes over WireGuard tunnels, streams metrics to a Python scoring service, which returns a ranked route table consumed by the client every 15 minutes.
lessonsLearned: Retraining cadence matters more than model complexity for this problem
WireGuard's userspace implementation made cross-platform benchmarking far simpler

title: FlowStack
description: A drag-and-drop workflow builder for automating everyday developer tasks, built with Next.js.
longDescription: FlowStack lets teams chain together triggers and actions (webhooks, cron jobs, Slack messages, database writes) on a visual canvas, then compiles the graph into a serverless execution plan.
architecture: Canvas graph is serialized to a DAG, validated server-side, then compiled into queued jobs processed by a worker pool with Redis-backed retries.
lessonsLearned: Optimistic UI on the canvas needed a proper conflict-resolution strategy once autosave shipped

title: Pocket Ledger
description: An offline-first personal finance tracker for Android with on-device categorization.
longDescription: Pocket Ledger works entirely offline, syncing only when the user opts in. Transaction categorization runs on-device with a small classifier so no financial data ever leaves the phone by default.
architecture: Room database with an on-device TFLite classifier for auto-categorization, optional end-to-end encrypted sync layer built on top of a REST API.
lessonsLearned: Shipping a quantized model under 2MB required trimming the feature set aggressively

title: Cluster Atlas
description: A visual Kubernetes cost and health dashboard for small teams without a dedicated SRE.
longDescription: Cluster Atlas connects to a cluster's metrics API and renders cost attribution per namespace alongside health signals, aimed at teams too small to run a full observability stack.
architecture: Read-only controller queries the metrics-server and cloud billing API, aggregates by namespace/label, and serves a websocket feed to the dashboard.
lessonsLearned: Cost attribution accuracy depends heavily on consistent labeling discipline across teams

title: ShieldScan
description: A lightweight CLI that scans Dockerfiles and IaC configs for common misconfigurations.
longDescription: ShieldScan runs a rule-based static analysis pass over Dockerfiles, Terraform, and Kubernetes manifests, flagging common misconfigurations before they reach production.
architecture: Rule engine parses config ASTs and matches against a versioned rule set, with results exported as SARIF for CI integration.
lessonsLearned: SARIF output made GitHub code-scanning integration nearly free

title: Flutter FormKit
description: An open-source Flutter package for building validated, animated multi-step forms fast.
longDescription: FlutterFormKit provides a declarative API for multi-step forms with built-in validation, progress indicators, and page transitions, published on pub.dev.
architecture: Widget tree exposes a FormController via InheritedWidget, letting steps stay decoupled from the surrounding navigation.
lessonsLearned: Good pub.dev documentation drove more adoption than any feature did
